'''ravatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oops|oops]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oops|oops]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ravatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rævæthæth|rævæthæth]] || [[word:rævæthæj|rævæthæj]] || [[word:rævæthæsh|rævæthæsh]] || [[word:rævæthæ|rævæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ravavathath|ravavathath]] || [[word:ravavathaj|ravavathaj]] || [[word:ravavathash|ravavathash]] || [[word:ravavatha|ravavatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ravathath|ravathath]] || [[word:ravathaj|ravathaj]] || [[word:ravathash|ravathash]] || [[word:ravatha|ravatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ravafthath|ravafthath]] || [[word:ravafthaj|ravafthaj]] || [[word:ravafthash|ravafthash]] || [[word:ravafthaf|ravafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ravathatha|ravathatha]] || [[word:ravathaja|ravathaja]] || [[word:ravathasha|ravathasha]] || [[word:ravathaka|ravathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ravathath|ravathath]] || [[word:ravathaj|ravathaj]] || [[word:ravathash|ravathash]] || [[word:ravatha|ravatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ravathathal|ravathathal]] || [[word:ravathajal|ravathajal]] || [[word:ravathashal|ravathashal]] || [[word:ravathakal|ravathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ravathathatha|ravathathatha]] || [[word:ravathajaja|ravathajaja]] || [[word:ravathashasha|ravathashasha]] || [[word:ravathaka|ravathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ravathathan|ravathathan]] || [[word:ravathajan|ravathajan]] || [[word:ravathashan|ravathashan]] || [[word:ravathakan|ravathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ravathathaoro|ravathathaoro]] || [[word:ravathajaoro|ravathajaoro]] || [[word:ravathashaoro|ravathashaoro]] || [[word:ravathakaoro|ravathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
